summary: The diff implements all OTP backend functionality (sendOTP, verifyOTP) in main.mo, updates the frontend LoginPage with improved styling and loading states, and integrates useOTPAuth hook with backend API calls. All five requirements (REQ-59 through REQ-63) are fully addressed with appropriate error handling, validation, and user feedback.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module (backend/migration.mo) implementing data migration from old actor structure to new actor structure with dropped legacy data
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not mention data migration, schema changes, or dropping old data structures. This was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Authorization/access control system with admin and user permissions
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly states to maintain single-actor backend architecture and does not request implementing role-based access control or permission systems.

hallucinated_features.description: User profile management methods (getCallerUserProfile, getUserProfile, saveCallerUserProfile) with authorization checks
hallucinated_features.reason: While profile saving is needed for signup flow, the BuildRequest does not specify implementing these specific backend methods with admin/user permission checks. The authorization layer was not requested.
